user.title: iPool Light (BLE)
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your iPool / LedBle RGB pool light (from Settings → Bluetooth in Home Assistant or from the vendor app / nRF Connect).

init.title: iPool Light options
init.description: The light entity always works with on/off, RGB, and brightness. Enable animation presets only if you want the same jump/gradient/flash modes as the iPool app (optional select entities).

data.effect_selects_enabled: Enable RGB / warm-cool / dim preset selects
